mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, card_id AS cardId, quantity FROM user_collection WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COALESCE((SELECT quantity FROM user_collection WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND card_id = #{cardId}), 0)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_collection (user_id, card_id, quantity) VALUES (#{userId}, #{cardId}, #{delta}) ON CONFLICT (user_id, card_id) DO UPDATE SET quantity = user_collection.quantity + EXCLUDED.quantity
